name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash Mesa, Arizona — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day in-store a...
description_long:
Speedy Cash operates as a storefront lending facility in Memphis, Tennessee, specializing in short-term personal loans and financial services. The company has established a physical retail presence with multiple locations across the Memphis area, positioning itself as a neighborhood-based alternative to traditional banking for customers needing quick access to funds.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due on next payday), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw-down options and repayment over time), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral). Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit card services. Applications can be initiated online or completed in-person at their retail locations.

Speecy Cash distinguishes itself through in-store personalized service, with staff available to review loan options, answer questions during application, and address funding or repayment inquiries. The company emphasizes transparency by providing customers with full cost disclosure before loan agreement signing. Extended store hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, open Saturdays) accommodate working customers. Multiple nearby locations in the Memphis area provide accessibility.

The company operates in the high-cost lending space targeting consumers with limited traditional banking access or urgent cash needs. While offering convenience and speed, the products carry the inherent characteristics of short-term lending: likely high APRs, short repayment windows, and potential debt cycle risks. The payday loan cap of $425 limits usefulness for substantial expenses, and title loan collateralization creates vehicle repossession risk.
address: 1215 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 1215 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: Same-day in-store application and rapid funding for payday loans
Multiple loan options (payday, line of credit, title loans) up to $4,000 for different borrowing needs
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm) and Saturday availability (9am-4pm) for working customers
Flexible line of credit with draw-down capability up to approved limit
In-person staff guidance through application process with transparent cost disclosure before signing
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) at same location
Multiple Memphis-area locations for convenience (8+ locations listed)
Online application option available to start process remotely
cons: High-cost lending products (payday and title loans) typical of industry with undisclosed APR rates on website
Short repayment window for payday loans (due next payday) creates potential debt cycle risk
Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking vehicle repossession for non-payment
Payday loan maximum of $425 may be insufficient for many genuine emergencies
No APR, term length, or fee transparency displayed on website despite company's stated transparency commitment
best_for: Workers with irregular pay schedules needing bridge loans between paydays
Borrowers with vehicles and immediate large cash needs (up to $4,000) willing to secure with title
Customers seeking flexible revolving credit via line of credit for ongoing variable expenses
Individuals without traditional bank access preferring in-person service and immediate approval
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals with immediate cash needs and limited traditional banking access who can complete applications in-person at their Memphis location. The primary caveat is that all products carry high costs typical of short-term lending, with payday loans creating particular debt-cycle risk due to short repayment windows, and title loans creating vehicle repossession risk for missed payments.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
Customer service via phone (English and Spanish)
In-person loan document review and signing
